title: No Surface Lava
description: Prevents lakes of lava generating in your world
body:
## About

I created this as these lava lakes have annoyed me for so long, and has destroyed so much beautiful nature in my worlds. So if you're tired of the same thing happening in your worlds, then finally there is a fix!

![Before and After](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/83f84925463849b54c9379fd6d5f16c3bc796aa7.jpeg)

## Functionality

This is a mod/datapack that will disable lava lakes from generating in your world. This also includes lava flooding out the side of mountains.

Exists as a mod available for all 1.21 versions. Or a datapack, with seperate versions available for all 1.21 versions.
